title: Update InferencePort AI Base URL
author: sharktide
pr_body_excerpt: Change the InferencePort AI base URL for 3D generation from https://sharktide-lightning.hf.space/v1 to https://api.inferenceport.ai/v1

gist.headline: 3D takes the scenic route
gist.blurb: The 3D generator now talks directly to InferencePort's proper API address. One less mysterious detour for the little polygon seedlings.
gist.summary: Updated the InferencePort client used by 3D generation from the sharktide-lightning Hugging Face Space URL to the official https://api.inferenceport.ai/v1 endpoint.
gist.impact: 3D generation requests now use InferencePort's dedicated API endpoint, giving the integration a cleaner and more reliable route to the service.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly tending a small garden of chunky low-poly 3D shapes growing from an API pipe that has been rerouted from a tiny cloud sign to a neat InferencePort terminal. The route change should feel like a cozy, well-marked garden path; include glowing endpoint arrows, flowers, and a helpful CRT robot checking the connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-dark-brown striped bee with pink rectangular blush, black oval eyes, light blue rounded wings, and a tiny technician tool belt, carefully connecting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) API pipe to a friendly retro terminal labeled "INFERENCEPORT" while low-poly cube and sphere flowers sprout nearby; a chunky CRT monitor robot happily verifies the new route. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, subtle scanlines, warm cream and lavender garden background, dark purple (#110518) outlines, nostalgic but beautiful.
